description: Discord is a free, all-in-one voice, video, and text chat platform for communities, gamers, and teams.
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up, create servers, invite members; developers can create bots via the Developer Portal
api_surface: Extensive REST API, Gateway WebSocket, Webhooks, Slash Commands, Interactions, Rich Presence, etc.
buildability: High – multiple SDKs, libraries, clear documentation, sandboxed bot environment
main_blocker: Rate limits and privileged intents restrictions for bots; limited access to certain privileged data without approval
